response.original_title: アンブレラ: You can’t always get what you want
response.overview: This film was directed by Hiroyuki Yanase, who also directed Obsessed with Champon. Although its theme and story differ completely from his previous work, presenting a serious romantic drama, it remains infused with the director’s characteristically relaxed and easygoing style. The result is a distinctly 1980s atmosphere light, mellow, and refreshingly unconventional. The film is particularly notable for Kinoshita’s graceful camerawork and Mōri’s outstanding title and credit design.
response.tagline: I never wanted to destroy the peaceful life I shared with the man I was living with…
response.title: アンブレラ: You can’t always get what you want
